input:
Title: Bug: Slack connector drops messages when rate limit is hit
Author: Aiko Yamamoto
Assignee: Aiko Yamamoto
Labels: bug, connector, P1
Milestone: v0.8.1

Body:
When the Slack API returns 429 Too Many Requests, the connector silently drops the message instead of retrying. Observed in production workspace 'Fintech Startup Inc'.

Expected: exponential backoff with 3 retries.
Actual: message dropped, no retry log.

Fix: implement retry logic in SlackConnector.process_event(). Reviewer: Marcus Stern.
